# pricefixed

Open, dependency-free tools that pull apartment prices and history out of the
walled gardens, plus a standardized public record of NYC buildings. Output is
plain SQLite. MIT.

This page (pricefixed.polyfeeds.dev) is the launch page. The project lives at:

- Repo: https://github.com/pauljump/pricefixed
- Start here as an agent: https://github.com/pauljump/pricefixed/blob/main/AGENTS.md
- Guided build prompt: https://github.com/pauljump/pricefixed/blob/main/BUILD.md
- Source map (build a new adapter): https://github.com/pauljump/pricefixed/blob/main/FEEDS.md
- Adapter method: https://github.com/pauljump/pricefixed/blob/main/COMPILE.md

Fastest start: clone the repo and run `python3 scrape.py`. Python 3.9+ stdlib only.
